case_for: OBJ occasionally flashes big-play upside as seen in his 19.7-point outburst, so a touchdown or two could push him past the threshold in a favorable matchup.
case_against: His role has been marginal for months, with five of his last six games under 5.3 points and a projection of just 5.2, showing he's simply not seeing the volume needed to hit 12.
